debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
labels : List α
label : α
⊢ fastCheckMem α inst✝ label (buildBST α labels) = true ↔ label ∈ labels

failed_attempts:
match labels with
  | [] => simp; sorry
  | x :: xs =>
    rw [fastCheckMem_correct]
    · simp [buildBST]
      have mem_addLabel (t : LabelledTree α) (L : α) (y : α) :
          (t.addLabel L).mem y ↔ t.mem y ∨ y = L := by
        induction t with
        | leaf v =>
          simp [LabelledTree.addLabel]
          split_ifs <;> simp [LabelledTree.mem] <;> tauto
        | node v l r ihl ihr =>
          simp [LabelledTree.addLabel]
          split_ifs <;> simp [LabelledTree.mem, ihl, ihr] <;> tauto
      have mem_fold (ys : List α) (acc : LabelledTree α) :
          (ys.foldl LabelledTree.addLabel acc).mem label ↔ acc.mem label ∨ label ∈ ys := by
        induction ys generalizing acc with
        | nil => simp
        | cons z zs ih =>
          simp [ih, mem_addLabel]
          tauto
      rw [mem_fold]
      simp [LabelledTree.mem]
      tauto
    · apply buildBST_ordered

match labels with
  | [] => simp [buildBST]; sorry
  | x :: xs =>
    simp [buildBST]
    have ord := buildBST_ordered (x :: xs)
    simp [buildBST] at ord
    rw [fastCheckMem_correct _ _ ord]
    generalize leaf x = t
    have mem_addLabel (t : LabelledTree α) (l : α) (y : α) :
        y ∈ t.addLabel l ↔ y = l ∨ y ∈ t := by
      induction t <;> simp [LabelledTree.addLabel]
      · split_ifs <;> simp [LabelledTree.mem] <;> tauto
      · split_ifs <;> simp [LabelledTree.mem, *] <;> tauto
    induction xs generalizing t
    · simp [LabelledTree.mem]
    · simp [xs_ih, mem_addLabel]; tauto

match labels with
  | [] => simp [buildBST]; sorry
  | h :: t =>
    rw [fastCheckMem_correct label (buildBST (h :: t)) (buildBST_ordered (h :: t))]
    simp [buildBST]
    have mem_addLabel_iff (t : LabelledTree α) (x v : α) :
        x ∈ addLabel t v ↔ x = v ∨ x ∈ t := by
      induction t with
      | leaf y =>
        simp [addLabel]
        split_ifs <;> simp [mem]
        · subst v; tauto
        · constructor <;> intro h <;> cases h <;> simp_all
          exact Or.inr (Or.inl rfl)
        · constructor <;> intro h <;> cases h <;> simp_all
          exact Or.inr (Or.inl rfl)
      | node y l r ihl ihr =>
        simp [addLabel]
        split_ifs
        · simp [mem, ihl]; tauto
        · simp [mem, ihr]; tauto
    have fold_mem (l : List α) (tree : LabelledTree α) :
        label ∈ l.foldl addLabel tree ↔ label ∈ tree ∨ label ∈ l := by
      induction l generalizing tree with
      | nil => simp
      | cons x xs ih =>
        simp
        rw [ih, mem_addLabel_iff]
        tauto
    rw [fold_mem]
    simp [mem]
    tauto

match labels with
  | [] => sorry
  | x :: xs =>
    simp [buildBST]
    have h : IsOrdered (buildBST (x :: xs)) := buildBST_ordered (x :: xs)
    rw [fastCheckMem_correct label _ h]
    let rec mem_addLabel (t : LabelledTree α) (y : α) (z : α) :
        LabelledTree.mem (LabelledTree.addLabel t y) z ↔ LabelledTree.mem t z ∨ y = z := by
      induction t with
      | leaf v => simp [LabelledTree.addLabel]; split_ifs <;> simp [LabelledTree.mem] <;> tauto
      | node v l r ihl ihr => simp [LabelledTree.addLabel]; split_ifs <;> simp [LabelledTree.mem, ihl, ihr] <;> tauto
    let rec aux (t : LabelledTree α) (l : List α) :
        LabelledTree.mem (l.foldl LabelledTree.addLabel t) label ↔ LabelledTree.mem t label ∨ label ∈ l := match l with
      | [] => by simp
      | y :: ys => by simp [aux (LabelledTree.addLabel t y) ys, mem_addLabel]; tauto
    rw [aux]
    simp [LabelledTree.mem]
    tauto

    have h_add : ∀ (t : LabelledTree α) (v l : α), l ∈ addLabel t v ↔ l = v ∨ l ∈ t := by
      intro t v l; induction t <;> simp [addLabel, mem]
      case leaf z => split_ifs <;> simp_all; tauto

match labels with
  | [] => simp [buildBST]; sorry
  | x :: xs =>
    simp [buildBST]
    rw [fastCheckMem_correct]
    · have mem_addLabel (t : LabelledTree α) (L y : α) :
          LabelledTree.mem (t.addLabel L) y ↔ y = L ∨ LabelledTree.mem t y := by
        induction t with
        | leaf v =>
          unfold LabelledTree.addLabel
          split_ifs
          · simp [LabelledTree.mem]; aesop
          · simp [LabelledTree.mem]; aesop
          · simp [LabelledTree.mem]; aesop
        | node v l r ihl ihr =>
          unfold LabelledTree.addLabel
          split_ifs
          · simp [LabelledTree.mem, ihl]; aesop
          · simp [LabelledTree.mem, ihr]; aesop
      
      have h_fold : ∀ (init : LabelledTree α) (l : List α),
          (∀ y, LabelledTree.mem (l.foldl LabelledTree.addLabel init) y ↔ y ∈ l ∨ LabelledTree.mem init y) := by
        intros init l
        induction l generalizing init with
        | nil => simp
        | cons a as ih =>
          simp
          intro y
          rw [ih]
          rw [mem_addLabel]
          aesop
      
      specialize h_fold (leaf x) xs
      rw [h_fold]
      simp [LabelledTree.mem]
    · apply buildBST_ordered

          split_ifs <;> simp [LabelledTree.mem, *]
          · rw [or_comm]

          split_ifs <;> simp [LabelledTree.mem, *] <;> rw [or_assoc, or_left_comm]
      have h : ∀ t, ∀ y, y ∈ xs.foldl LabelledTree.addLabel t ↔ y ∈ t ∨ y ∈ xs := by
        intro t y
        induction xs generalizing t with
        | nil => simp
        | cons z zs ih => simp [ih, mem_addLabel, or_assoc]
      rw [h]
      simp [LabelledTree.mem, or_comm]
    · apply buildBST_ordered

match labels with
  | [] => simp [buildBST]; sorry
  | x :: xs =>
    dsimp [buildBST]
    rw [fastCheckMem_correct _ _ (buildBST_ordered (x :: xs))]
    have mem_addLabel : ∀ (t : LabelledTree α) (v : α) (l : α), l ∈ t.addLabel v ↔ l ∈ t ∨ l = v := by
      intro t v l
      induction t with
      | leaf y =>
        simp [LabelledTree.addLabel]
        split_ifs <;> simp [LabelledTree.mem] <;> try tauto
        intro h; rw [h]; tauto
      | node y l r ihl ihr =>
        simp [LabelledTree.addLabel]
        split_ifs <;> simp [LabelledTree.mem, ihl, ihr] <;> tauto
    rw [List.mem_cons]
    generalize h : leaf x = t
    have ht : ∀ a, a ∈ t ↔ a = x := by rw [←h]; simp
    clear h
    induction xs generalizing t with
    | nil => simp [ht]
    | cons y ys ih =>
      simp; rw [ih]
      · simp [mem_addLabel]; tauto
      · intro a; rw [mem_addLabel, ht]; tauto

        split_ifs <;> simp_all
      have mem_fold (t : LabelledTree α) (ys : List α) :
          label ∈ ys.foldl addLabel t ↔ label ∈ t ∨ label ∈ ys := by
        induction ys generalizing t with
        | nil => simp
        | cons z zs ih => simp [ih, mem_addLabel, or_assoc]
      rw [mem_fold]

      tauto
    · apply buildBST_ordered

match labels with
